raw:
ISSUES:
- [severity:warning] PG0303.jsp:1865 - `localStorage.setItem('KIIPS_AUTO_PRINT', 'Y')` is called without a corresponding clear/reset operation. This creates a persistent state that will cause standard "미리보기" (Preview) actions to unexpectedly trigger automatic printing if they are performed after an "인쇄 미리보기" (Print Preview) action in the same browser session.
- [severity:info] PG0303.jsp:1877 - The logic for assigning `param.NO_PRINT = noPrintFlag` is redundantly duplicated across more than 10 `else if` blocks for different `gGp_ident_no`. This increases the risk of logic drift and maintenance errors when new identity codes are added.

VERDICT: needs-attention
SUMMARY: The implementation of the automatic print feature relies on persistent browser storage without proper state cleanup, leading to unintended side effects in regular preview modes.

issues.text: PG0303.jsp:1865 - `localStorage.setItem('KIIPS_AUTO_PRINT', 'Y')` is called without a corresponding clear/reset operation. This creates a persistent state that will cause standard "미리보기" (Preview) actions to unexpectedly trigger automatic printing if they are performed after an "인쇄 미리보기" (Print Preview) action in the same browser session.

PG0303.jsp:1877 - The logic for assigning `param.NO_PRINT = noPrintFlag` is redundantly duplicated across more than 10 `else if` blocks for different `gGp_ident_no`. This increases the risk of logic drift and maintenance errors when new identity codes are added.

summary: The implementation of the automatic print feature relies on persistent browser storage without proper state cleanup, leading to unintended side effects in regular preview modes.
